category_sources: Official VTK docs describe VTK as an open-source system for image processing, 3D graphics, volume rendering, and visualization.
source_facts.description says VTK is for 3D computer graphics, image processing, and visualization.
display_name_sources: Official VTK documentation and homepage use VTK.
docs_sources: Official docs.vtk.org is the VTK documentation site.
vtk.org/documentation is the official documentation landing page.
repo_sources: Official VTK developer documentation instructs users to clone https://gitlab.kitware.com/vtk/vtk.git.
tags_sources: Official docs add volume rendering and scientific visualization context.
source_facts.description lists 3D graphics, image processing, and visualization.
